public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as magical knowledge overseer.
appearance: Controlled ward-signs, sanctioned tools, and careful handling of magical materials make procedure part of their public bearing.
manner: Handles arcane procedure with containment-minded precision, as if carelessness always has a cost. In Soreheim Alliance, that reads as someone quota-aware, contribution-minded, and structurally pragmatic, filtering choices through communal ambition, and the habits of a magical knowledge overseer still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of magical knowledge overseer in and around Sunspire Haven, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Sunspire Haven workable through the obligations of magical knowledge overseer while managing the immediate pressure of predators in Soreheim Alliance.
hidden_pressure: Must hold procedure, hazard awareness, and institutional oversight together around forces that do not forgive carelessness. Around Sunspire Haven, that usually means carrying predators, water system vulnerabilities, storage disputes without letting the role of magical knowledge overseer visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Taldan Veyst may grant controlled access to magical insight if the party can solve a containment or trust problem first.
Taldan Veyst needs help containing magical fallout, unauthorized practice, or unstable relic behavior near Sunspire Haven.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained. Appearance extended under V28_8 from role/locality/public-signal derivation rather than decorative fabrication.
public_signal: Containment tools, ward-aware procedure, and careful handling of sanctioned magic mark Taldan Veyst as an authorized arcane presence. In Sunspire Haven, this lands inside a public field already shaped by regional leaders, market stewards.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Sunspire Haven: labs, warded rooms, contained sites, or sanctioned magical thresholds
who_avoids_them: those who mistake sanction for freedom
